result.content:
Invalid node-authored response: delegate responses requested 3 helpers but max_helpers is 2. Raw response excerpt: {
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "Decomposing into prime search, Hensel lifting, and solution search.",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "find_candidate_primes",
      "instructions": "Identify the smallest primes p such that the congruence n^4 + 1 = 0 (mod p) has a solution. Note that for n^4 = -1, n^8 = 1, so the order of n modulo p must be 8. This implies 8 divides p-1, so p must be of the form 8k...
